title: Ubiquiti Wave-LR, UISP Wave Long-Range
description: Wave Long Range is a 60GHz point-to-multipoint (PtMP) client device with built-in 5GHz backup (WiFi 6 - 802.11ax) from Ubiquiti with a range up to 8 km and is ideal for ISPs. The very compact and durable device is also equipped with integrated GPS , Bluetooth for simple initial setup from a mobile via the UISP mobile application and a Gigabit LAN port with PoE support . The device supports both bridge and NAT mode and supports 1080 and 2160 MHz channel width in the 60GHz spectrum.
